name: Texas
why_ruby_pro: TABC compliance reporting built in, not bolted on
Three-tier enforcement you can trust automatically
Credit checks across 60K+ accounts without manual lookups
problem: TABC reports assembled manually every month
Three-tier violations from missing visibility into the chain
Credit exposure growing across accounts with no real-time checks
difference: Auto-generate TABC-ready compliance reports from live data
Enforce three-tier rules at the order level, not after the fact
Run real-time credit checks before every release
how_it_works: One-click TABC reporting from your actual transaction data
See every account, every order, every compliance flag in one view
Track profitability by route, by account, by SKU across Texas
